title: Substance Use Disorder Hotlines * Veteran/Military Personnel Issues - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Mental & Behavioral Health > Substance Use Disorder Hotlines * Veteran/Military Personnel Issues 1 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Refine Results - Select - No Filter Veteran/Military Personnel Issues Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF LINES FOR LIFE MILITARY HELPLINE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a helpline giving information about benefits, PTSD, substance use disorders, anger management issues, and counseling in regard to suicidal thoughts. 5100 SW Macadam Avenue Suite 400 Portland, OR 97239 Eligibility: Individuals who are active duty military, veterans, and their families Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (888) 457-4838 Get Directions Visit Website More Details LINES FOR LIFE MILITARY HELPLINE
